metaBuilds.title: Magical Skirmisher
metaBuilds.whyLine: Strongest meta core for 10s rotation damage, online around minute 24 — about 1,959 damage over a 10s rotation in the sim.
metaBuilds.optimizer: Optimizer sees +30% more 10s rotation damage: try Spectral Schematics over Combustion (sim-only — the popular pick may carry utility the sim can't see; test it).

metaBuilds.title: Magical Burst
metaBuilds.whyLine: Strongest meta core for one-combo burst, online around minute 24 — about 1,358 damage in one combo in the sim.
metaBuilds.optimizer: Optimizer agrees: within 3% of our best core on one-combo burst. The winrate is earned, not luck.

metaBuilds.title: Magical Frontline
metaBuilds.whyLine: Strongest meta core for physical survivability, online around minute 24 — about 3,796 effective HP vs physical in the sim.
metaBuilds.optimizer: Optimizer sees +23% more physical survivability: try Spectral Schematics over Combustion (sim-only — the popular pick may carry utility the sim can't see; test it).

matchups.gameplan: They out-threaten you whenever the lane is not even: treat this as a farm-and-team lane, not a duel. The Fey deals area damage — spread out so one cast can't catch the group.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Raiment of Renewal instead of Spectral Schematics: their 3s all-in loses 11% of its bite, at the cost of 29% of this kit's damage.

matchups.gameplan: You hold the kill-threat edge wherever one exists: play front-foot, but respect jungle attention. Argus deals area damage — spread out so one cast can't catch the group.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Raiment of Renewal instead of Spectral Schematics: their 3s all-in loses 13% of its bite, at the cost of 27% of this kit's damage.

matchups.gameplan: You hold the kill-threat edge wherever one exists: play front-foot, but respect jungle attention. Renna's main threat is Mortal Coil; bait it before you commit, and mixed resist softens the trade.

matchups.gameplan: They out-threaten you whenever the lane is not even: treat this as a farm-and-team lane, not a duel. Gideon deals area damage — spread out so one cast can't catch the group.

matchups.gameplan: You hold the kill-threat edge wherever one exists: play front-foot, but respect jungle attention. Lt. Belica executes low targets with Neural Disruptor — don't linger below half HP.

matchups.gameplan: Even kill threat throughout: this lane is decided by mechanics and wave control, not scaling. Kwang ramps on auto-attacks — pressure them before they itemize, and mixed resist blunts them later.

laneSteer.provenance: “Sanguine Slash” ⇒ ability-burst; the sim models this augment — field jungle 44.8% over 509 games.

flags: crests and consumables not yet in the build model; augments with tractable mechanics are simulated, the rest are listed unmodeled
